raw_cv_text:
Alejandro Ruiz-Martinez
+44 7911 456 789 | Email: alejandro.ruiz.martinez@gmail.com | LinkedIn: alejandro-ruiz-martinez | GitHub:
AlejandroRuizMartinez | https://alejandro.dev
EDUCATION
Imperial College London | MEng Computer Science 2013-2017
First-class honors (GPA 3.9/4.0); awarded Imperial Prize for Excellence in final year project on
distributed consensus
Led Systems Architecture club (60+ members); organized weekly seminars with engineers from
Citadel and Google on low-latency systems design
University of Cambridge | Postgraduate Diploma in Advanced Computing 2017-2018
Distinction (92/100) in Distributed Systems and Advanced Algorithms; thesis published in ACM
SIGOPS Workshop on Research on Cloud Computing
Teaching assistant for 3 courses on concurrency and distributed systems; mentored 25 undergraduates
in systems design projects
EXPERIENCE
Stripe | Senior Backend Engineer, Payments Infrastructure 2021-Present
Architected new payment processing pipeline reducing latency from 450ms to 89ms p99 (80%
improvement) for 8M+ daily transactions; directly enabled 3 new partnerships worth $150M ARR
Owned ledger microservice handling $2.3T in annual volume; optimized database queries reducing
CPU utilization by 42%, saving $680K/year in infrastructure costs across 12 regions
Led cross-functional team of 6 engineers (backend, payments, security) on idempotency framework;
prevented $4.2M in duplicate transaction losses, reduced fraud losses by 23% YoY
Wise (formerly TransferWise) | Backend Engineer, Core Payments 2019-2021
Redesigned multi-currency settlement engine to support real-time processing; increased throughput
from 45K to 320K transactions/hour, handling 8 currency corridors across 190+ countries
Implemented distributed tracing infrastructure using Jaeger/Opentelemetry across 120+
microservices; reduced mean time to resolution (MTTR) for production incidents from 47min to
12min
Built redundancy layer for foreign exchange rate feeds; achieved 99.99% availability (4 minutes
downtime/month) and reduced FX quote errors by 87%, protecting $120M daily forex volume
Cloudflare | Backend Engineer, Billing & Payments 2018-2019
Developed webhook delivery system processing 600M events/month with 99.95% guaranteed
delivery; implemented exponential backoff with intelligent retry logic reducing customer complaint
tickets by 64%
Optimized billing calculation engine handling 2.1M active accounts; reduced monthly batch job
runtime from 8.5 hours to 1.2 hours through algorithmic improvements and parallelization
Migrated legacy payment processor integration (Stripe) for 450K+ customers with zero downtime;
coordinated testing of 2.3M transactions, achieved 0 data loss
Jane Street | Backend Engineer, Clearing & Settlement 2017-2018
Built real-time position reconciliation system matching 15B+ trades daily with 100ms latency;
detected booking discrepancies affecting $2.1M and prevented settlement fails worth $8.4M
Optimized order routing algorithm improving execution quality by 1.3 basis points on average;
generated incremental trading P&L of $12.8M annually
Designed circuit breaker and failover mechanisms for NYSE/NASDAQ connectivity; achieved
99.998% uptime during critical trading windows across 50+ trading pairs
PROJECTS
PaymentVault | Go, PostgreSQL, gRPC, Protocol Buffers, Redis 2022-Present
Open-source encrypted payment token storage service with compliance features (PCI-DSS, SOC2);
1,200+ GitHub stars, 28K monthly downloads, used by 12 fintech companies processing $500M+
annually
Achieved sub-millisecond token lookup (p99: 0.8ms) through optimized in-memory caching and
database indexing; benchmarks show 450K ops/sec throughput on standard hardware
TxnReplay | Python, Kubernetes, PostgreSQL, Prometheus, Grafana 2021-2023
Transaction replay and debugging tool for payment systems; 890 GitHub stars, used internally at 3
major fintech firms for forensic analysis; reduced payment dispute investigation time by 71%
Processed 50M+ transaction records in replay tests; memory-efficient streaming design handles 10GB
datasets with <512MB peak memory, supporting 99.2% test coverage for legacy payment flows
DistributedLedger | Rust, DynamoDB, EventSourcing, Tokio async runtime 2020-2022
CRDT-based distributed ledger for microservices; 650+ GitHub stars, 15K monthly downloads from
package managers; consistent replication across 7 data centers with eventual consistency guarantees
Benchmarks demonstrate 89% reduction in reconciliation time (from 4.2 hours to 28 minutes) vs.
traditional approaches; write latency: 18ms p99, 240K writes/sec sustainable throughput
EXTRACURRICULAR
QCon London & GOTO Conferences | Conference Speaker (3 talks) 2021-2024
Spoke on 'Building Resilient Payment Systems at Scale' (2023, 800+ attendees); talk published on
InfoQ with 52K views, invited to present at 4 additional conferences including QCon San Francisco
Co-authored workshop 'Distributed Transactions in Payments Infrastructure' reaching 200+ engineers;
workshop rated 4.8/5.0 stars (180 responses); mentored 12 participants who later implemented
learnings in production
Open Payments Community Foundation | Core Maintainer & Technical Advisor 2019-Present
Lead maintainer for OpenPayments specification; 450+ GitHub stars, 80+ contributors across 15
countries; specification adopted by 22 fintech companies including 2 unicorns
Mentored 18 junior engineers on systems design and payments architecture; 6 mentees promoted to
senior roles; organized monthly technical workshops averaging 45+ attendees
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – Go, Python, Rust, SQL, Java, JavaScript/TypeScript
Technologies – PostgreSQL, Redis, DynamoDB, Kafka, gRPC, Protocol Buffers, Distributed Systems,
Event Sourcing, CRDT, Microservices Architecture, Real-time Processing, Message Queues,
Idempotency Patterns
Tools – Kubernetes, Docker, Prometheus, Grafana, DataDog, Jaeger, Git, GitHub, Jira, Terraform, AWS
(EC2, RDS, DynamoDB, S3, Lambda), GCP
name: Email

projects.subtitle: Go, PostgreSQL, gRPC, Protocol Buffers, Redis
